seo.title: Practice Name | Specialty Care in City
seo.description: Patient-centered specialty care for adults and families in City, State.

hero.title: Care that starts with understanding.
hero.copy: Clear, patient-centered care for people seeking thoughtful support, practical next steps, and a calmer healthcare experience.

providers.name: Dr. Provider Name
providers.philosophy: A short statement about the provider's clinical focus and approach.
providers.bio: A concise provider bio describing training, care style, and patient population.

conditionsIntro: We provide evaluation and ongoing care for a range of health concerns.

faqs.question: Do you offer telehealth appointments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Telehealth may be available depending on patient needs, provider availability, and state requirements.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: The office can help confirm accepted plans, benefits, and any next steps before your first visit.

faqs.question: How do I request an appointment?
faqs.answer: Submit the appointment request form or call the office. The team will follow up with availability and next steps.

contact.title: Ready to get started?
contact.copy: Request an appointment and the office will follow up with next steps, availability, and insurance information.
contact.disclaimer: The office typically responds within 1 business day.
